about.label: About
about.title: Welcome to Apartment Dora
about.description: Nestled in the peaceful village of Povljana on the island of Pag, Apartment Dora offers a perfect retreat for those seeking sun, sea, and tranquility. With warm interiors, a private barbecue area, and stunning views of the Adriatic, your holiday starts the moment you arrive.

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.desc: Stay cool during warm summer days

items.title: BBQ Area
items.desc: Private barbecue grill in the outdoor area

items.title: Full Kitchen
items.desc: Fully equipped kitchen for home cooking

items.title: Near the Beach
items.desc: Just 50 metres from the crystal-clear sea

location.label: Location
location.title: Povljana, Island of Pag
location.description: Povljana is a charming village on the southern tip of the island of Pag, known for its calm, shallow waters ideal for families and crystal-clear sea. The island is easily reachable by ferry and offers a unique blend of untouched nature, local gastronomy, and authentic Croatian island life.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to book your stay or have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
